description_long: This object is a modern flat-screen computer monitor with a wide rectangular display and a slim, matte black bezel. The front features a vibrant screen displaying a digital desktop with various icons and a calendar, while the bezel is thin and uniform, giving the monitor a sleek appearance. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, rectangular flat base and a robust central stand, which appears to be made of plastic with a matte finish. The rear of the monitor is angular and faceted, with a central support column that likely houses internal cabling and structural components. No visible buttons or ports are present on the front or sides, and the overall design is minimalist and professional. The monitor's color is predominantly black, with a small green accent on the lower right bezel.
description: A sleek, black flat-screen computer monitor with a thin bezel, rectangular base, and minimalist design. The display is vibrant and the stand is robust and angular.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profile of the monitor and the depth of the central support stand.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide display, thin bezel, and a small green accent on the lower right corner.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the monitor's thinness and the solid, rectangular base.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the angular back panel and the central support column, with no visible ports or buttons.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, matte black, and uniform in thickness around the display, with sharp corners and a small green accent on the lower right. It has a smooth, non-reflective finish and no decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a flat, rectangular base with a thick, central support column. It appears to be made of matte black plastic and is robust, providing stable support without visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: A single button is visible on the lower right corner of the front bezel, separated from other controls.
